message:
ci: enhance release workflow and add e2e tests

- Enhanced release.yml with multi-platform builds:
  - Linux (x86_64, x86_64-musl, aarch64)
  - macOS (x86_64, aarch64)
  - Windows (x86_64)
- Added automatic checksum generation (SHA256SUMS.txt)
- Added GitHub Release creation with installation instructions
- Created e2e.yml workflow for end-to-end tests
- Added robot mode validation tests

Part of meta_skill-628 (CI/CD Pipeline)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,104 @@
+name: E2E Tests
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  RUST_LOG: debug
+
+jobs:
+  e2e:
+    name: End-to-End Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Build release binary
+        run: cargo build --release
+
+      - name: Run E2E tests
+        run: |
+          export PATH="$PWD/target/release:$PATH"
+          cargo test --test '*' -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee e2e-output.log
+
+      - name: Upload E2E logs
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: e2e-logs
+          path: |
+            e2e-output.log
+            tests/e2e/*.log
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  robot-mode:
+    name: Robot Mode Validation
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Build release binary
+        run: cargo build --release
+
+      - name: Test robot mode JSON output
+        run: |
+          export PATH="$PWD/target/release:$PATH"
+
+          # Initialize ms in temp directory
+          TEMP_MS=$(mktemp -d)
+          cd "$TEMP_MS"
+
+          # Test ms init --robot
+          echo "Testing: ms init --robot"
+          ms init --robot 2>&1 | tee init.json
+          if ! jq -e '.status' init.json > /dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo "ERROR: ms init --robot did not produce valid JSON"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          # Test ms doctor --robot
+          echo "Testing: ms doctor --robot"
+          ms doctor --robot 2>&1 | tee doctor.json
+          if ! jq -e '.' doctor.json > /dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo "ERROR: ms doctor --robot did not produce valid JSON"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          # Test ms search --robot (may return empty but should be valid JSON)
+          echo "Testing: ms search --robot"
+          ms search "test" --robot 2>&1 | tee search.json || true
+          if ! jq -e '.' search.json > /dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo "ERROR: ms search --robot did not produce valid JSON"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          echo "All robot mode tests passed!"
+
+      - name: Upload robot mode logs
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: robot-mode-logs
+          path: |
+            *.json
+          retention-days: 7

@@ -1,13 +1,163 @@
 name: Release
 
 on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
   workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      version:
+        description: 'Release version (e.g., 0.1.0)'
+        required: true
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  BINARY_NAME: ms
 
 jobs:
   build:
+    name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            os: ubuntu-latest
+            archive: tar.gz
+          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
+            os: ubuntu-latest
+            archive: tar.gz
+          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            os: ubuntu-latest
+            archive: tar.gz
+          - target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            os: macos-latest
+            archive: tar.gz
+          - target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            os: macos-latest
+            archive: tar.gz
+          - target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            os: windows-latest
+            archive: zip
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Install cross-compilation tools (Linux ARM)
+        if: matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu
+
+      - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl)
+        if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools
+
+      - name: Build release binary
+        run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Create archive (Unix)
+        if: matrix.os != 'windows-latest'
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p dist
+          cp target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }} dist/
+          cd dist
+          tar -czvf ../${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.gz *
+
+      - name: Create archive (Windows)
+        if: matrix.os == 'windows-latest'
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          mkdir dist
+          cp target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}.exe dist/
+          Compress-Archive -Path dist/* -DestinationPath ${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ matrix.target }}.zip
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ matrix.target }}
+          path: ${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${{ matrix.target }}.${{ matrix.archive }}
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  release:
+    name: Create Release
+    needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
-      - name: Build
-        run: cargo build --release
+
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: artifacts
+
+      - name: Flatten artifacts
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p release
+          find artifacts -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.zip" \) -exec mv {} release/ \;
+
+      - name: Generate checksums
+        run: |
+          cd release
+          sha256sum * > SHA256SUMS.txt
+          cat SHA256SUMS.txt
+
+      - name: Determine version
+        id: version
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
+            echo "version=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
+        with:
+          tag_name: v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          name: Release v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.version.outputs.version, '-') }}
+          files: release/*
+          body: |
+            ## ms v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+
+            ### Checksums
+            See `SHA256SUMS.txt` for file checksums.
+
+            ### Installation
+
+            **Linux (x86_64)**
+            ```bash
+            curl -LO https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/ms-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
+            tar -xzf ms-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
+            sudo mv ms /usr/local/bin/
+            ```
+
+            **macOS (Apple Silicon)**
+            ```bash
+            curl -LO https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/ms-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
+            tar -xzf ms-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
+            sudo mv ms /usr/local/bin/
+            ```
+
+            **Windows**
+            Download `ms-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip` and extract to your PATH.
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
